values.value: Flags any successful login in the last 24 hours where the User.IsActive flag is false. A successful login against an inactive user typically means the account was temporarily reactivated for an attack, credentials were used in the window before disable propagated, or a service account is misclassified. Each occurrence is high signal and warrants immediate investigation.

Immediately revoke active sessions and OAuth tokens for the user. Reset the password and ensure IsActive remains false. Review who reactivated the account, recent admin activity, and any data accessed during the session. If the user is a legitimate service account, reclassify it and document the exception.
